lockedDecisions.question: Should the bar span full height of the category block or header only?
lockedDecisions.decision: Full height — bar runs from category label through all items in that category.

lockedDecisions.question: Apply bar treatment to top-level store groups too?
lockedDecisions.decision: No — stores keep existing card/border treatment. Categories only.

lockedDecisions.question: Left indent for items from the bar on mobile?

resumePrompt: Resume Concepture-Planner session planner-1779802846-4f53ef. Active PRD draft: docs/drafts/prd-category-group-left-bar.md. Feature: replace nested category color dot with a full-height 3px left vertical color bar; indent items 12px from bar. Stores keep existing card treatment. Locked decisions: full-height bar, categories only, 12px indent. PRD has 3 stories (S-1, S-2, S-3). Awaiting user review.
